subcodes.first_line: O thou who art denoted by M.H.! The Wronged One, Who hath manifested Himself through His Name, the Self-Subsisting, maketh mention of thee and beareth witness to thy turning unto Him, thy devotion and thy sincerity towards God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: م ح یذکرک المظلوم الذی ظهر باسمه القیوم و یشهد بتوجهک و اقبالک و خلوصک لله رب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @love of God
